description: Tileable classic lattice-gradient (Perlin) FBM. period must be a positive integer; lacunarity should be an integer (2 is standard) for guaranteed per-octave tiling.

params.name: period
params.description: Noise lattice tile size in cells. MUST be a positive integer. Use the same value as 'scale' for a single tile across the texture.

params.name: lacunarity
params.description: Frequency multiplier per octave. USE INTEGER VALUES (2.0 is the standard) for exact tiling at every octave. Non-integer values tile approximately.

params.name: speed
params.description: Translates the sample point over time (multiplied by pc.time). Produces smooth animation but does NOT preserve tiling along the time axis.

params.name: seed
params.description: Per-node noise seed. Change to get a fully decorrelated pattern.
